text:
It was hot. Too hot. Too sweaty. Too... everything.

They had come for weeks. From miles away. To see her. She was beautiful. She remembered it now. Dark hair. Eyes like oceans. So much passion.

They brought food. She smelled the cinnamon rolls. They danced under the stars. He pulled her close.

Then, one night, rain. Soft, gentle rain. They cuddled close. Raindrops on feathers.

Later, she felt it. Something pulling. A little. Like a dream.

She woke up alone. The rain stopped. She looked outside. Everything looked better. Sunny.

She went outside. Trees. Birds. Flowers.

She smiled. Really smiled.

Maybe this was home.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
